spec_match.rationale: Perfectly demonstrates all configuration properties (type, format, length, language) side-by-side.

interactive.rationale: Knobs are fully interactive and allow immediate execution of both custom setups side by side.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fits the spec requirements and milestone description perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Features a fallback generator mimicking key-points, tldr, and headline tone.

references.rationale: Has relevant ChromeStatus and spec links.

design_system.rationale: Fits the dual-column responsive CSS layout guidelines beautifully.

summary: Excellent side-by-side comparison demo illustrating the differences between format type and length parameters.
